name: create_recipient
description: Create a recipient (beneficiary) account that you can send money to. You need to provide the recipient's name, currency, and bank account details specific to their country and account type.

parameters.name: profile
parameters.description: Your Wise profile ID (personal or business).

parameters.name: accountHolderName
parameters.description: Full legal name of the recipient as it appears on their bank account.

parameters.name: currency
parameters.description: ISO 4217 currency code for the recipient's account.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: The account type. Depends on the target currency and country (e.g., 'iban', 'sort_code', 'aba', 'swift_code').

parameters.name: details
parameters.description: Bank account details specific to the account type. For IBAN: { "IBAN": "..." }. For sort_code: { "sortCode": "...", "accountNumber": "..." }.
